tagline: Turn your Polarsteps trips into photo albums

landing.autoAlbumBody: Upload your Polarsteps export and get a full photo album in seconds - covers, stats, photo layouts, ready to customize.
landing.hikeMapBody: Hikes and flights are detected from your GPS data. Add map pages with satellite imagery, elevation profiles, and trail stats.
landing.videoPosterBody: Pick the perfect frame from any video to use in your album. Scrub frame-by-frame and set a poster - no screenshots needed.
landing.localizationBody: Supports any language, including right-to-left layout. Dates, distances, and temperatures adapt to your locale and units.
landing.ctaBody: Sign in with Google and upload your Polarsteps data to get started.

register.getDataBody: Log in at {link} on a desktop computer. Go to {settings}, scroll to {download} in the privacy section, and click {startArchive}. You'll get an email with a download link.
register.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {max} GB.
register.evictedBody: Your files were cleaned up to save space, but your edits are saved. Re-upload your data to continue where you left off.
register.reuploadBody: Upload new data to update your albums with the latest photos and trips.
register.unsupportedBody: Switch to a recent browser: {chrome}, {firefox}, {safari}, or {edge}.

delete.title: Delete all data?
delete.body: This will permanently remove your uploaded data and all albums. You'll need to upload again to continue.

error.processingFailed: Processing failed. Please try again later.

screen.title: Larger screen required
screen.body: This app is designed for desktops and landscape tablets. Use a laptop or desktop computer, or rotate your tablet to landscape.
